message:
🌱 knative: Feature Request: Support Downward API (#1908)

* 🌱 Add knative: Feature Request: Support Downward API mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add knative: Feature Request: Support Downward API mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix knative Downward API mission: replace closed PR, fix resolution

- Replace closed PR #4102 with correct merged PR #8126 (FieldRef support)
- Replace "leaving in icebox" resolution with accurate description of
  FieldRef support for metadata.name, metadata.namespace, spec.serviceAccountName
- Update steps to show FieldRef usage in Knative Service specs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-4190-feature-request-support-downward-api",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative: Feature Request: Support Downward API",
+    "description": "Feature Request: Support Downward API. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current knative deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your knative version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative\nhelm list -n knative 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working knative installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative\nkubectl get configmap -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative\n```\n## In what area(s)?\r\n\n## Describe the feature\n\nThere are many use-cases for knowing information about a particular revision from within the user container."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use FieldRef in Knative Service specs",
+        "description": "Knative Serving supports the Kubernetes Downward API via `fieldRef` in container environment variables. You can reference pod metadata fields:\n```yaml\napiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1\nkind: Service\nmetadata:\n  name: my-service\nspec:\n  template:\n    spec:\n      containers:\n        - image: my-image:latest\n          env:\n            - name: POD_NAME\n              valueFrom:\n                fieldRef:\n                  fieldPath: metadata.name\n            - name: POD_NAMESPACE\n              valueFrom:\n                fieldRef:\n                  fieldPath: metadata.namespace\n            - name: SERVICE_ACCOUNT\n              valueFrom:\n                fieldRef:\n                  fieldPath: spec.serviceAccountName\n```\nSupported fieldRef fields are `metadata.name`, `metadata.namespace`, and `spec.serviceAccountName`. Projected volumes with downwardAPI are also supported in newer versions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative\nkubectl get events -n knative --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Feature Request: Support Downward API\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Knative Serving added support for Kubernetes Downward API FieldRef in container specs. Supported fields include metadata.name, metadata.namespace, and spec.serviceAccountName. This was implemented in PR #8126 (FieldRef support) and later expanded in PR #13896 (projected volumes with downwardAPI).",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/serving/issues/4190",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/serving",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/knative/serving/pull/8126"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 21,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:30:00.880Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
